title: Protecting guest user information
excerpt:

posts.author: dumlaok (Kimberly Dumlao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone! I wanted to know what your experience has been in ensuring guest information is protected in the app and what methods/settings you’ve ensured are turned on to help with this (i.e. privacy, etc).

I’m noticing on the app especially, guests have more access to information vs. on web.

Thanks in advance
